intentSynonyms: look up market hours in robinhood
fetch a single market hours in robinhood
view one specific market hours in robinhood
get market hours for a date in robinhood
description: Get market trading hours for a specific date including open/close times and extended hours windows.

market.description: Market MIC code (default XNYS for NYSE)

date.description: Date to check in YYYY-MM-DD format
